title: Tilde path test
prompt: Create /tmp/blair-tilde-test.txt with text Success. Then read it back.

title: Rename Blair to Blair throughout codebase
prompt:
Rename the project from "Blair" to "Blair" throughout the entire codebase. This includes:

1. All filenames containing "vance" → "blair"
2. All directory names containing "vance" → "blair"
3. All references to "Blair" in code comments, strings, documentation
4. Package.json, config files, HTML titles
5. Memory files and documentation (MEMORY.md, projects.md, daily notes)
6. JavaScript variable names, class names, function names with "vance"
7. HTML ids, data attributes, CSS classes with "vance"
8. URLs and ports (localhost:4000 stays same, but references to "Blair service" become "Blair service")
9. README.md and any docs
10. Git references (if any)

Be thorough. Search for variations like "Blair", "vance", "VANCE", "blair-" etc.

After the rename:
- Verify all files are updated
- Run a final grep to confirm no stray "Blair" references remain (except in git history)
- Commit with message: "refactor: rename Blair to Blair throughout codebase"
- Push to remote
